crons.comment: Hosted-platform health check across all READY provisions every 15 min. Only runs on the orchestrator deploy (NEXT_PUBLIC_HOSTED_ENABLED=true); the route returns 401 on tenant deploys because they don't have the orchestrator's piggyback_provisions table.

Hosted-platform migration propagation every hour. Walks each READY provision and applies any pending migrations from the bundled supabase/migrations/ to their per-tenant Supabase via stored OAuth refresh tokens.
Phase 3.2 — Release subdomain aliases whose 30-day redirect window has expired. Removes the old hostname from the user's Vercel project and deletes the alias row.
Phase 4 — Daily activation/retention rollup. Computes returned_d1/d7/d30 from funnel_events + last_seen_at, mirrors to the dashboard at /admin/funnel.

headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://vercel.live; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https:; connect-src 'self' https://*.supabase.co wss://*.supabase.co https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com https://api.openai.com https://api.anthropic.com https://vercel.live; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'
